name: Giant Ice Cream Sandwich Sundae
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces (1 cup) semi-sweet chocolate chips, if desired
1/2 gallon (8 cups) any flavor ice cream, slightly softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line two 12-inch pizza pans with foil.
3. In a large bowl, combine brownie mix, water, oil, eggs, and chocolate chips; beat for 50 strokes with a spoon.
4. Spread half of the batter in each foil-lined pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes. Do not overbake. Allow to cool, then freeze for 1 to 2 hours for easy handling.
6. Remove from pans and foil.
7. Assemble by placing one brownie round on a serving plate. Spoon softened ice cream evenly over the brownie. Top with remaining brownie. Cover; freeze until firm.
8. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, combine powdered sugar, chocolate chips, milk, and margarine. Bring to a boil; cook for 8 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Allow to cool.
9. Let ice cream sandwich stand at room temperature for 10 to 15 minutes before serving. Cut into wedges; drizzle with topping.
Yield: 16 servings
